title: China-to-Seychelles Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
provenance: AI-compiled, multi-model cross-checked, not human-verified. Informational only; confirm with the official regulator and a qualified professional. Not legal/certification/customs/market-access advice.

rows.requirement: EMC — IEC 62920 and IEC 61000 Evidence for Seychelles PV Inverters
rows.target_requirement: Seychelles PV inverter EMC expectations should be prepared on an IEC basis because SBS is the national standards body and project specifications for grid-connected PV commonly reference IEC-family inverter evidence. The practical EMC package should include IEC 62920 for PV power conversion equipment and applicable IEC 61000-series evidence for emissions, immunity, harmonics, surge, voltage dips, and power quality. For PUC grid-connected projects, harmonic and conducted-emission evidence should be tied to the actual inverter model, rating, and configuration. Because Seychelles uses a 240/415 V, 50 Hz grid, EMC and harmonic results obtained only under China 220/380 V conditions should be reviewed for applicability before submission.
target_standards: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment
IEC 61000 series — Electromagnetic compatibility test, immunity, harmonic, surge, voltage-dip, and power-quality standards as applicable to the inverter configuration
SBS standards adoption and project specification requirements where applicable
PUC grid-connection review requirements for power quality and harmonic performance
rows.china_equivalent: Chinese PV inverter EMC evidence commonly relies on GB/T 37408-2021 and related domestic EMC test reports from CNAS-accredited laboratories. These reports can be useful engineering background but are not automatically equivalent to IEC 62920 or the IEC 61000-series evidence requested by a Seychelles project owner, SBS conformity route, SEC review, or PUC grid-connection process. China test conditions are normally aligned with the China 220/380 V, 50 Hz baseline, while Seychelles uses 240/415 V at the same frequency.
china_standards: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
CNAS-accredited domestic EMC test reports under China standard scopes
rows.gap: Gap: China-only EMC certificates under GB/T 37408 do not automatically satisfy Seychelles IEC-based project expectations. Exporters should obtain IEC 62920 and applicable IEC 61000-series reports for the specific model or family, confirm whether harmonics and conducted-emission results remain valid at 240/415 V, and provide surge, earthing, shielding, and enclosure documentation suitable for humid coastal installations. Where PUC or the project owner specifies harmonic limits or power-quality measurements, test reports should be mapped clause-by-clause to that requirement.

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific and effectively mandatory where SBS, SEC, PUC, or project-owner documentation calls for IEC EMC and power-quality evidence
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 37408 EMC evidence is a China domestic voluntary or certification-programme baseline and is not a Seychelles IEC evidence substitute

rows.verdict: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat Seychelles PV inverter EMC as an IEC evidence package, not a China GB/T certificate transfer. Prepare IEC 62920 and applicable IEC 61000-series reports for the exact inverter model, review harmonic and EMC applicability at Seychelles' 240/415 V 50 Hz grid voltage, and confirm any SBS, SEC, PUC, or project-owner EMC requirements before shipment.

rows.requirement: Seychelles PUC Grid-Connection Review — IEC 62116, IEC 61727, and 240/415 V 50 Hz Settings
rows.target_requirement: Grid-connected solar PV inverters in Seychelles should be treated as project-level grid-connection equipment subject to Public Utilities Corporation (PUC) technical review and Seychelles Energy Commission (SEC) energy-sector oversight. The practical IEC evidence package normally includes IEC 62116 anti-islanding and IEC 61727 utility-interface compliance, with firmware protection thresholds, reconnection delay, voltage windows, and frequency windows validated for Seychelles' 240/415 V, 50 Hz low-voltage grid. Seychelles uses the same 50 Hz frequency as China, but the nominal voltage differs: Seychelles is 240 V single-phase and 415 V three-phase, while China is 220/380 V under GB/T 156. The country is an Indian Ocean island state with a strong solar push and coastal exposure, so commissioning files should also document thermal and salt-mist derating assumptions for the installed site.
target_standards: IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
PUC project grid-connection and commissioning requirements for the relevant installation
SEC electricity-sector approval or oversight requirements where applicable
Seychelles low-voltage grid context — 240 V single-phase / 415 V three-phase, 50 Hz
rows.china_equivalent: Chinese PV inverter grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024 for PV power station connection, NB/T 32004 for grid-connected inverter technical specifications, GB/T 37408 for PV grid-connected inverter requirements, and domestic anti-islanding test results. These documents are built around China grid conditions and domestic acceptance procedures. China's low-voltage baseline is 220/380 V at 50 Hz, not Seychelles' 240/415 V at 50 Hz. Chinese grid certificates and factory firmware settings do not automatically transfer to PUC acceptance or SEC project review in Seychelles.
china_standards: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
rows.gap: Gap: China GB/T and NB/T grid-connection evidence is not a substitute for Seychelles PUC project acceptance. Exporters should prepare IEC 62116 anti-islanding evidence, IEC 61727 utility-interface evidence, a Seychelles-specific settings file, and commissioning records for 240/415 V at 50 Hz. Do not describe Seychelles voltage as matching China: only the 50 Hz frequency matches, while nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V. For coastal or island-grid sites, include salt-mist, humidity, thermal derating, earthing, surge protection, and weak-grid ride-through assumptions in the project file.

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for grid-connected projects through PUC technical review and any applicable SEC project approval or oversight
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence satisfies China domestic grid acceptance only and is not a PUC Seychelles approval substitute

rows.verdict: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T grid-connection documents do not automatically satisfy Seychelles PUC grid-connection review. Prepare IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 evidence, re-parameterise inverter firmware for Seychelles' 240/415 V at 50 Hz grid, and document salt-mist and thermal derating for coastal installation. Verify current PUC and SEC project requirements directly before shipment or commissioning.

rows.requirement: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 Safety Evidence and Coastal Derating for Seychelles PV Inverters
rows.target_requirement: For Seychelles solar PV projects, inverter safety documentation should be prepared around IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 type-test evidence for the exact inverter model or family. SBS is the national standards body, SEC oversees the energy sector, and PUC controls the practical grid-connection interface, so project submissions should include accredited IEC safety reports, installation manuals, ratings, nameplate data, protection-device coordination, earthing instructions, and environmental limits. Seychelles is a humid, salt-mist coastal island market, so safety files should also address enclosure ingress protection, corrosion-resistant materials, terminal temperature rise, ventilation, and derating for high humidity and marine exposure.
target_standards: IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
SBS standards adoption and conformity expectations where applicable
SEC and PUC project documentation requirements for grid-connected solar PV equipment
Project environmental requirements for coastal salt-mist, humidity, ingress protection, corrosion resistance, and thermal derating
rows.china_equivalent: China safety documentation for PV grid-connected inverters commonly uses GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, domestic CQC or CGC voluntary certification, and CNAS-accredited laboratory reports. These documents are useful for supplier qualification but are not automatically accepted as IEC 62109-1/-2 evidence for Seychelles projects. Chinese safety reports may also be based on China-rated configurations, labels, manuals, surge protection, and 220/380 V assumptions, while Seychelles project files must reflect 240/415 V, 50 Hz installation conditions and coastal environmental exposure.
china_standards: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
CQC / CGC voluntary certification programmes for China domestic PV inverter safety and performance
rows.gap: Gap: A China-only GB/T 37408 or NB/T 32004 safety file does not automatically satisfy Seychelles IEC safety expectations. Exporters should provide IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test reports for the supplied model or model family, confirm that labels and manuals match the Seychelles configuration, document protection coordination and earthing, and add environmental evidence for salt-mist corrosion, ingress protection, humidity, ventilation, and thermal derating. Any changes to enclosure, terminals, firmware settings, surge protection, or nameplate ratings for Seychelles can require updated safety documentation.

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice where SBS, SEC, PUC, EPC, lender, insurer, or project-owner documentation requires IEC 62109 safety evidence for grid-connected PV inverters
mandatory_status.cn: China GB/T, NB/T, CQC, or CGC safety evidence applies to China domestic or voluntary certification contexts and is not automatically transferable to Seychelles

rows.verdict: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not rely on China GB/T or NB/T inverter safety files alone for Seychelles PV projects. Prepare IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test evidence for the exact model, align labels and manuals to Seychelles' 240/415 V 50 Hz configuration, and document coastal salt-mist, humidity, ingress-protection, corrosion, and thermal-derating controls. Confirm current SBS, SEC, PUC, and project-owner safety requirements before shipment.
